ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mandis" (
  "mandi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mandi */,
  "mandi_name" TEXT /* Name of the mandi */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the mandi is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the mandi */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the mandi */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the mandi was established */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., wholesale, retail) */,
  "total_traders" INTEGER /* Number of traders registered in the mandi */,
  "total_farmers" INTEGER /* Number of farmers registered in the mandi */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the mandi is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the mandi's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mandi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "mandi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mandi where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "arrival" INTEGER /* Number of units of produce arriving at the mandi */,
  "min_price" INTEGER /* Minimum price of the produce */,
  "max_price" INTEGER /* Maximum price of the produce */,
  "average_price" INTEGER /* Average price of the produce */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of produce (e.g., wheat, rice) */,
  "quantity_units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the arrival (e.g., kg, quintal) */,
  "source_region" TEXT /* Region where the produce originates */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions on the day of data collection */,
  "price_trend" TEXT /* Trend of price changes (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "quality_grade" TEXT /* Quality grade of the produce (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_mandi_id FOREIGN KEY ("mandi_id") REFERENCES mandis ("mandi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the user is responsible for */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., market analysis, data science) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market report */,
  "mandi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mandi for which the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary or abstract of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report file (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been accessed */,
  "last_accessed_date" TEXT /* Date of the last access to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_mandi_id FOREIGN KEY ("mandi_id") REFERENCES mandis ("mandi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
